summary: Verified the fees auto-generation bug fix end-to-end. 11/11 backend pytest cases passed and mobile-web spot-check confirmed the locked ALPHA org chip on new-player form + Collect Fees search finding Mohit Raj. Mohit's dues (Registration 15,000 + Monthly 12,000, period 2026-07) are correctly present; collecting the Monthly fee via /api/fees/collect-multi returned a batch_id, receipt PDF was downloadable, and /api/fees/dashboard reflected +12,000 in Balua's collected_today. Regression: POST /api/people with kind=player and organization='BOTH' was force-overridden to 'ALPHA' and Registration+Monthly fees were auto-created at Daily/Cricket rate card (3000 / 2500). All cleanup performed — Mohit's Monthly fee reverted to 'due' (mode/reference/paid_at/batch cleared) and the TEST_ throwaway player + fees deleted from DB (including one leftover from an earlier partial run).
action_items: None from this iteration — bug fix is verified. Optional: consider a scheduled/nightly reconciler that ensures every kind=player person also has a Registration fee row (defence-in-depth against future silent auto-fee failures).
Cosmetic: React Native Web deprecation warnings in console ('shadow*' style props / props.pointerEvents). Not a blocker but worth cleaning up in a follow-up.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/people.py L88-92: organization is now unconditionally forced to 'ALPHA' for kind=player and assigned_coach_id=None — matches the fix. Good.
routers/people.py L96-102: auto_create_fees_for_player errors are now logged via logger('fees').exception instead of swallowed silently — matches the fix.
routers/fees.py auto_create_fees_for_player is idempotent on (player_id, fee_type, period_month), so retrying a repair migration is safe.
manage/[kind]/[id].tsx L338-339: POST body hardcodes organization: 'ALPHA'; L884-887 renders the locked chip with testID 'org-locked-alpha' and hides the PWS/BOTH picker for player kind.

success_rate.frontend: 100% spot-check (locked-org chip, Collect Fees search, login all pass)

seed_data_creation: None persisted. A temporary player 'TEST_Fee Test Player' + 2 fees were created and deleted within the same run. Mohit Raj's Monthly fee was collected then reverted to 'due'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test suite /app/backend/tests/test_fees_bug_fix.py is idempotent — its module-scoped autouse fixture resets Mohit's Monthly fees to 'due' at start, and cleanup deletes any test player + fees at end. Safe to re-run repeatedly. Server date is 2026-07-08, so current month is 2026-07 — hardcoded amounts assume Mohit's override (Reg 15000 / Monthly 12000).
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE (already fixed by main agent): The add-player form let the operator pick organization=BOTH, but auto_create_fees_for_player early-returns unless organization=='ALPHA'; combined with a bare try/except that swallowed the error, Mohit's fees were silently never created. FIX (verified): backend force-sets organization='ALPHA' on kind=player and logs auto-fee errors via logger.exception. Frontend replaces org picker with a locked chip and hardcodes 'ALPHA' in the POST body. Data repair for Mohit already backfilled correctly (Reg 15000 + Monthly 12000 due for 2026-07).
